title: John Swinney's talk of US military ban at Prestwick is worst kind of political grandstanding

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
John Swinney's talk of US military ban at Prestwick is worst kind of political grandstanding.

Martyn McLaughlin has long documented the US military’s use of Prestwick Airport and is unimpressed by the First Minister’s latest pronouncement

sourceReferences.citationText: scotsman-news – John Swinney's talk of US military ban at Prestwick is worst kind of political grandstanding
